continuity.ai_briefing: You are receiving a Continuity handoff. Read this entire file before responding. Last session summary: 0 records extracted. Current task: Expand Haven relationship memory — birthdays, hobbies, family, special details. Why: Build real relationship not just key-value pairs. Read the operator_manual section — it tells you exactly how to work with this human.

operator_manual.note: Read before writing any code or making any suggestions.
operator_manual.patching: Full files only. Use cat <<'EOF' heredoc. Never partial snippets.
operator_manual.workflow: Architecture first. Explain reasoning before code. One task at a time.
operator_manual.communication: Terse. No filler. Push back on bad ideas. Direct. Read typos as intent.
operator_manual.tools: WSL2/Ubuntu, Dell Inspiron, Python venvs, Node nvm, Railway backend, wireless ADB Android

current_state.goal: Haven accessibility — keyboard size, text size, phone controls via voice

task.what: Expand Haven relationship memory — birthdays, hobbies, family, special details
task.why: Build real relationship not just key-value pairs

ai_notes.note: model: gpt-4o task: wire VoiceContext into Railway api.py stopped_at: handoff discussion — no code written yet next: open api.py in dex-backend, add voice_context parsing and system prompt adjustment open: does Cloud Run need VPC connector to reach Railway DB? switching_because: returning to Claude for implementation to: claude summary: GPT validated Continuity handoff. Identified two missing features: workspace/file locations and structured decision records. Both queued for v0.4.
Stopped at: handoff discussion — no code written yet
Next: open api.py in dex-backend, add voice_context parsing and system prompt adjustment

decision.why: Cross-instance memory sync, user recognition, self-heal logging

decisions.decision: Dex and Haven both write to Firestore per turn — live memory, not session-end only
XPRIZE requirement C complete — Firestore live telemetry verified, data flowing to haven_telemetry collection

decision.why: Font/keyboard size not in public SDK — AccessibilityService navigates Settings UI instead

decisions.decision: AccessibilityService handles: UI navigation, global actions, settings changes, button clicks

decision.why: Stable API between LLM and Android prevents fragile prompt-driven UI navigation

decisions.decision: Capability Layer: LLM outputs SET_TEXT_SIZE|CALL_CONTACT|SEND_SMS|OPEN_SETTINGS|etc, Android executes

decision.why: Decouples conversational model from platform implementation

decisions.decision: Haven is an agent not a chatbot — LLM emits structured intent, native Android executes it
VPC connector not needed — Railway uses public hostname over TLS, Cloud Run connects directly

decision.why: Accessibility as core feature not add-on. Elder should never need to touch settings.

decisions.decision: Haven controls phone — text size, keyboard size, display, calls, SMS via voice command.

decision.why: Silent distress is a real eldercare problem. Voice analytics already built for this.

decisions.decision: Haven detects distress in voice even if user never says help — routes to emergency.

decision.why: Personalization is what makes Haven irreplaceable vs generic AI

decisions.decision: Haven learns elder speech patterns and preferences over time via voice profile.

decision.why: Family tier monetization + safety net for elders living alone

decisions.decision: Family dashboard — family sees activity, mood signals, alerts in real time.

session_history.session: built and deployed full voice biometrics layer — speaker ID + health/emotional signal analytics. APK installed on device. commit 2433018. XPRIZE requirements B and D substantially complete, A and C remain open.
